AddRegion.description: Grants permission to add a region to an IAM Identity Center instance

AssociateDirectory.description: Grants permission to connect a directory to be used by AWS IAM Identity Center

AssociateProfile.description: Grants permission to create an association between a directory user or group and a profile

AttachCustomerManagedPolicyReferenceToPe.description: Grants permission to attach a customer managed policy reference to a permission set

AttachManagedPolicyToPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to attach an AWS managed policy to a permission set

CreateAccountAssignment.description: Grants permission to assign access to a Principal for a specified AWS account using a specified permission set

CreateApplication.description: Grants permission to create an application

CreateApplicationAssignment.description: Grants permission to create an application assignment

CreateApplicationInstance.description: Grants permission to add an application instance to AWS IAM Identity Center

CreateApplicationInstanceCertificate.description: Grants permission to add a new certificate for an application instance

CreateInstance.description: Grants permission to create an identity center instance

CreateInstanceAccessControlAttributeConf.description: Grants permission to enable the instance for ABAC and specify the attributes

CreateManagedApplicationInstance.description: Grants permission to add a managed application instance to AWS IAM Identity Center

CreatePermissionSet.description: Grants permission to create a permission set

CreateProfile.description: Grants permission to create a profile for an application instance

CreateTrust.description: Grants permission to create a federation trust in a target account

CreateTrustedTokenIssuer.description: Grants permission to create a trusted token issuer for an instance

DeleteAccountAssignment.description: Grants permission to delete a Principal's access from a specified AWS account using a specified permission set

DeleteApplication.description: Grants permission to delete an application

DeleteApplicationAccessScope.description: Grants permission to delete an access scope to an application

DeleteApplicationAssignment.description: Grants permission to delete an application assignment

DeleteApplicationAuthenticationMethod.description: Grants permission to delete an authentication method to an application

DeleteApplicationGrant.description: Grants permission to delete a grant from an application

DeleteApplicationInstance.description: Grants permission to delete the application instance

DeleteApplicationInstanceCertificate.description: Grants permission to delete an inactive or expired certificate from the application instance

DeleteInlinePolicyFromPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to delete the inline policy from a specified permission set

DeleteInstance.description: Grants permission to delete an identity center instance

DeleteInstanceAccessControlAttributeConf.description: Grants permission to disable ABAC and remove the attributes list for the instance

DeleteManagedApplicationInstance.description: Grants permission to delete the managed application instance

DeletePermissionSet.description: Grants permission to delete a permission set

DeletePermissionsBoundaryFromPermissionS.description: Grants permission to remove permissions boundary from a permission set

DeleteProfile.description: Grants permission to delete the profile for an application instance

DeleteTrustedTokenIssuer.description: Grants permission to delete a trusted token issuer for an instance

DescribeAccountAssignmentCreationStatus.description: Grants permission to describe the status of the assignment creation request

DescribeAccountAssignmentDeletionStatus.description: Grants permission to describe the status of an assignment deletion request

DescribeApplication.description: Grants permission to obtain information about an application

DescribeApplicationAssignment.description: Grants permission to retrieve an application assignment

DescribeApplicationProvider.description: Grants permission to describe an application provider

DescribeInstance.description: Grants permission to obtain information about an identity center instance

DescribeInstanceAccessControlAttributeCo.description: Grants permission to get the list of attributes used by the instance for ABAC

DescribePermissionSet.description: Grants permission to describe a permission set

DescribePermissionSetProvisioningStatus.description: Grants permission to describe the status for the given Permission Set Provisioning request

DescribeRegion.description: Grants permission to retrieve configuration details for a specific IAM Identity Center instance region

DescribeRegisteredRegions.description: Grants permission to obtain the regions where your organization has enabled AWS IAM Identity Center

DescribeTrustedTokenIssuer.description: Grants permission to describe a trusted token issuer for an instance

DetachCustomerManagedPolicyReferenceFrom.description: Grants permission to detach a customer managed policy reference from a permission set

DetachManagedPolicyFromPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to detach the attached AWS managed policy from the specified permission set

DisassociateDirectory.description: Grants permission to disassociate a directory to be used by AWS IAM Identity Center

DisassociateProfile.description: Grants permission to disassociate a directory user or group from a profile

GetApplicationAccessScope.description: Grants permission to get an access scope to an application

GetApplicationAssignmentConfiguration.description: Grants permission to read assignment configurations for an application

GetApplicationAuthenticationMethod.description: Grants permission to get an authentication method to an application

GetApplicationGrant.description: Grants permission to obtain details about a grant belonging to an application

GetApplicationInstance.description: Grants permission to retrieve details for an application instance

GetApplicationSessionConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get session configuration for an application

GetApplicationTemplate.description: Grants permission to retrieve application template details

GetInlinePolicyForPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to obtain the inline policy assigned to the permission set

GetManagedApplicationInstance.description: Grants permission to retrieve details for an application instance

GetMfaDeviceManagementForDirectory.description: Grants permission to retrieve Mfa Device Management settings for the directory

GetPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to retrieve details of a permission set

GetPermissionsBoundaryForPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to get permissions boundary for a permission set

GetProfile.description: Grants permission to retrieve a profile for an application instance

GetSSOStatus.description: Grants permission to check if AWS IAM Identity Center is enabled

GetSharedSsoConfiguration.description: Grants permission to retrieve shared configuration for the current SSO instance

GetSsoConfiguration.description: Grants permission to retrieve configuration for the current SSO instance

GetTrust.description: Grants permission to retrieve the federation trust in a target account

ImportApplicationInstanceServiceProvider.description: Grants permission to update the application instance by uploading an application SAML metadata file provided by the service provider

ListAccountAssignmentCreationStatus.description: Grants permission to list the status of the AWS account assignment creation requests for a specified SSO instance

ListAccountAssignmentDeletionStatus.description: Grants permission to list the status of the AWS account assignment deletion requests for a specified SSO instance

ListAccountAssignments.description: Grants permission to list the assignee of the specified AWS account with the specified permission set

ListAccountAssignmentsForPrincipal.description: Grants permission to list accounts assigned to user or group

ListAccountsForProvisionedPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to list all the AWS accounts where the specified permission set is provisioned

ListApplicationAccessScopes.description: Grants permission to list access scopes to an application

ListApplicationAssignments.description: Grants permission to list application assignments

ListApplicationAssignmentsForPrincipal.description: Grants permission to list applications assigned to user or group

ListApplicationAuthenticationMethods.description: Grants permission to list authentication methods to an application

ListApplicationGrants.description: Grants permission to list grants from an application

ListApplicationInstanceCertificates.description: Grants permission to retrieve all of the certificates for a given application instance

ListApplicationInstances.description: Grants permission to retrieve all application instances

ListApplicationProviders.description: Grants permission to list application providers

ListApplicationTemplates.description: Grants permission to retrieve all supported application templates

ListApplications.description: Grants permission to retrieve all applications associated with the instance of IAM Identity Center

ListCustomerManagedPolicyReferencesInPer.description: Grants permission to list the customer managed policy references that are attached to a permission set

ListDirectoryAssociations.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about the directory connected to AWS IAM Identity Center

ListInstances.description: Grants permission to list the SSO Instances that the caller has access to

ListManagedPoliciesInPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to list the AWS managed policies that are attached to a specified permission set

ListPermissionSetProvisioningStatus.description: Grants permission to list the status of the Permission Set Provisioning requests for a specified SSO instance

ListPermissionSets.description: Grants permission to retrieve all permission sets

ListPermissionSetsProvisionedToAccount.description: Grants permission to list all the permission sets that are provisioned to a specified AWS account

ListProfileAssociations.description: Grants permission to retrieve the directory user or group associated with the profile

ListProfiles.description: Grants permission to retrieve all profiles for an application instance

ListRegions.description: Grants permission to list all regions configured for an IAM Identity Center instance

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags that are attached to a specified resource

ListTrustedTokenIssuers.description: Grants permission to list trusted token issuers for an instance

ProvisionPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to provision a specified permission set to the specified target

PutApplicationAccessScope.description: Grants permission to create/update an access scope to an application

PutApplicationAssignmentConfiguration.description: Grants permission to add assignment configurations to an application

PutApplicationAuthenticationMethod.description: Grants permission to create/update an authentication method to an application

PutApplicationGrant.description: Grants permission to create/update a grant to an application

PutApplicationSessionConfiguration.description: Grants permission to put session configuration for an application

PutInlinePolicyToPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to attach an IAM inline policy to a permission set

PutMfaDeviceManagementForDirectory.description: Grants permission to put Mfa Device Management settings for the directory

PutPermissionsBoundaryToPermissionSet.description: Grants permission to add permissions boundary to a permission set

PutPermissionsPolicy.description: Grants permission to add a policy to a permission set

RemoveRegion.description: Grants permission to remove a region from an IAM Identity Center instance

SearchGroups.description: Grants permission to search for groups within the associated directory

SearchUsers.description: Grants permission to search for users within the associated directory

StartSSO.description: Grants permission to initialize AWS IAM Identity Center

TagResource.description: Grants permission to associate a set of tags with a specified resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to disassociate a set of tags from a specified resource

UpdateApplication.description: Grants permission to update an application

UpdateApplicationInstanceActiveCertifica.description: Grants permission to set a certificate as the active one for this application instance

UpdateApplicationInstanceDisplayData.description: Grants permission to update display data of an application instance

UpdateApplicationInstanceResponseConfigu.description: Grants permission to update federation response configuration for the application instance

UpdateApplicationInstanceResponseSchemaC.description: Grants permission to update federation response schema configuration for the application instance

UpdateApplicationInstanceSecurityConfigu.description: Grants permission to update security details for the application instance

UpdateApplicationInstanceServiceProvider.description: Grants permission to update service provider related configuration for the application instance

UpdateApplicationInstanceStatus.description: Grants permission to update the status of an application instance

UpdateInstance.description: Grants permission to update an identity center instance

UpdateInstanceAccessControlAttributeConf.description: Grants permission to update the attributes to use with the instance for ABAC

UpdateManagedApplicationInstanceStatus.description: Grants permission to update the status of a managed application instance

UpdatePermissionSet.description: Grants permission to update the permission set

UpdateProfile.description: Grants permission to update the profile for an application instance

UpdateSSOConfiguration.description: Grants permission to update the configuration for the current SSO instance

UpdateTrust.description: Grants permission to update the federation trust in a target account

UpdateTrustedTokenIssuer.description: Grants permission to update a trusted token issuer for an instance

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

identitycenter:ApplicationArn.description: Filters access by the ARN of the IAM Identity Center application

identitycenter:InstanceArn.description: Filters access by the ARN of the IAM Identity Center instance

sso:ApplicationAccount.description: Filters access by the account which creates the application. This condition key is not supported for customer managed SAML applications
